ogTitle: Beaumont Hills vs Bective: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beaumont Hills and Bective.
heading: Beaumont Hills vs Bective — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beaumont Hills, New South Wales and Bective, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaumont Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Bective (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beaumont Hills or Bective safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beaumont Hills has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Bective scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beaumont Hills scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Bective scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beaumont Hills or Bective?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaumont Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
